items.name: ferry token, 2031
items.desc: Brass, for a ferry line that ran exactly one summer between the floods. Collectors argue about which trip was last.

items.name: framed waterline photograph
items.desc: Somebody photographed their own living room at high water and framed it. The frame is water-damaged. That's the piece.

items.name: pre-collapse subway map
items.desc: Every line, all of them running, none of it true anymore. People cry at this. Fences pay for that.

items.name: cassette sermon, unlabeled
items.desc: A voice preaching about the water, recorded over somebody's wedding. Both events are still on the tape.

items.name: mayoral campaign button, 2025
items.desc: TOGETHER WE RISE. The slogan aged into a flood joke, which doubled the price.

items.name: stamped rooftop key
items.desc: Opens one roof door in the city. Nobody who buys it asks which one. That isn't what it's for.
